SELECT date_string, toDate32OrZero(date_string) AS converted_date FROM dates_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, date_string String);
SELECT a.id, toDate32OrZero(a.date_string) AS converted_date FROM another_table AS a JOIN dates_table AS d ON a.id = d.id;
SELECT toDate32OrZero(123), toDate32OrZero('2020-02-30'), toDate32OrZero(NULL), toDate32OrZero('invalid-date'), toDate32OrZero('');
WITH ('2022-01-01') AS valid_date, ('invalid') AS invalid_date SELECT toDate32OrZero(valid_date) AS valid_converted, toDate32OrZero(invalid_date) AS invalid_converted;
CREATE VIEW date_conversion_view AS SELECT date_string, toDate32OrZero(date_string) AS converted_date FROM dates_table;
SELECT * FROM date_conversion_view WHERE converted_date = toDate32OrZero('2023-01-01');
SELECT TO_ARRAY(toDate32OrZero(date_string)) FROM dates_table GROUP BY date_string;
